name: Account Takeover Indicators
description: Patterns indicating account compromise or unauthorized access
templates: password changed immediately after login
recovery email modified to external domain
login from new country within 1 hour of previous
MFA removed after suspicious login
shipping address changed before high-value order

name: Payment Fraud Patterns
description: Suspicious transaction patterns indicating payment fraud
templates: multiple small transactions under $1
10 transactions in 60 seconds
sequential card numbers attempted
item purchased then immediately refunded
shipping to known reshipping address

name: Synthetic Identity Fraud
description: Indicators of synthetic or fabricated identity usage
templates: SSN issued after claimed birth date
credit file less than 6 months old
5 applications with same phone different SSN
address associated with 20+ identities
name/DOB combination not in any database

name: Money Laundering Patterns
description: Transaction patterns associated with money laundering techniques
templates: multiple deposits just under $10,000
funds split across 10 accounts then reconsolidated
wire to high-risk country returned same day
company with no employees processing millions
cash deposits matching withdrawal pattern

name: Promotion and Coupon Abuse
description: Abuse of promotional offers, coupons, or loyalty programs
templates: 10 new accounts from same device in 1 hour
self-referral chain detected
signup bonus claimed then immediate withdrawal
multiple promo codes used sequentially
account created solely for free trial abuse
